-
-      <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Afghanistan?</h3>
-      <p>
-        An air ambulance service in Afghanistan provides critical medical transportation
-        by specially equipped aircraft for patients who require urgent or advanced medical
-        care. It is commonly used for international medical evacuation due to limited
-        access to specialized treatment locally.
-      </p>
-
-      <h3 class="h5 mt-4">2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services from Afghanistan?</h3>
-      <p>
-        Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides air ambulance and medical evacuation services from
-        Afghanistan, including coordination from major cities and airports, subject to
-        operational and aviation clearances.
-      </p>
-
-      <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important for patients in Afghanistan?</h3>
-      <p>
-        Air ambulance services are vital in Afghanistan due to limited access to advanced
-        medical facilities, urgent evacuation needs, and international treatment
-        requirements.
-      </p>
-
-      <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. How much does an air ambulance cost from Afghanistan?</h3>
-      <p>
-        Costs depend on destination, aircraft type, medical condition, and equipment.
-        Air Medical 24X7 provides free medical evaluation and transparent quotations.
-      </p>

-    <!-- PAGE TITLE -->
-    <h2 class="display-4 mb-4">
-      Air Ambulance Services in Albania
-    </h2>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7
-      from Albania to over 195 global destinations. We provide fast, reliable, and
-      cost-effective medical evacuation with expert critical care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 delivers emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets,
-      and international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Tirana,
-      Durrës, Shkodër, Vlorë, and all major regions of Albania.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and affordable air ambulance solutions for
-      critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and long-distance
-      medevac. Whether you require a private ICU air ambulance or a commercial stretcher
-      service, our experienced medical teams ensure uninterrupted care from bedside
-      pickup to final destination.
-    </p>

-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Albania?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Albania provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation by fully equipped aircraft for patients who require urgent or
-      advanced medical care, ensuring safe domestic or international transfer.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services across Albania?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides air ambulance services across Albania, including
-      Tirana and all major regions, as well as international medical evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. How much does an air ambulance cost in Albania?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Costs depend on distance, aircraft type, medical condition, and care level.
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers free medical assessment and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international evacuation?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We handle international evacuation from Albania to Europe, India, UAE,
-      USA, and other destinations with full coordination.
-    </p>

-    <!-- PAGE TITLE -->
-    <h2 class="display-4 mb-4">
-      Air Ambulance Services in Algeria
-    </h2>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides FAA-approved ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7
-      from Algeria to over 195 global destinations. We ensure fast, reliable, and
-      cost-effective medical evacuation with expert critical care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 delivers emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets,
-      and international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Algiers,
-      Oran, Constantine, Annaba, and all major regions of Algeria.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and affordable air ambulance solutions for
-      critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and long-distance
-      medical evacuations. Whether you need a private ICU air ambulance or a commercial
-      stretcher service, our experienced medical teams ensure uninterrupted care from
-      bedside pickup to final destination.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- WHY CHOOSE -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Why Choose Air Medical 24X7 in Algeria
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">24/7 Emergency Response</h3>
-    <p>
-      Immediate access to air ambulance services anywhere in Algeria, including remote
-      and mountainous regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Global Coverage</h3>
-    <p>
-      International connections to over 100 countries including France, Germany, Italy,
-      UK, USA, UAE, and Turkey.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Specialist Medical Teams</h3>
-    <p>
-      Highly trained critical care doctors, ICU nurses, and paramedics on every mission.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">ICU-Configured Aircraft</h3>
-    <p>
-      Advanced air ambulance jets and aircraft equipped with ventilators, monitors,
-      infusion pumps, and life-saving equipment.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Rapid Medical Evacuation</h3>
-    <p>
-      Fast deployment for trauma injuries, medical emergencies, neonatal transfers,
-      and humanitarian evacuations.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- COST -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Cost of Air Ambulance in Algeria
-    </h2>
-
-    <p>Air ambulance costs in Algeria depend on several factors:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Type of Aircraft</li>
-      <li>Distance and destination</li>
-      <li>Medical equipment required</li>
-      <li>Patient's medical condition</li>
-      <li>Size and expertise of the medical team</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides transparent and competitive pricing with no hidden charges.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- SERVICES -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Our Air Ambulance Services in Algeria
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Emergency Medical Flights</h3>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Immediate ICU air evacuation for critical patients</li>
-      <li>Departures from Algiers Houari Boumediene Airport and regional airstrips</li>
-      <li>Continuous monitoring and critical care during flight</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Medical Repatriation Flights</h3>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Safe return of patients to their home country</li>
-      <li>Complete coordination including documentation, permissions, visas, and ground ambulance services</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Commercial Airline Stretcher Services</h3>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Cost-effective solution for stable patients</li>
-      <li>Medical escort, airline approvals, and full coordination</li>
-      <li>Available on select international routes from Algeria</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Private Air Ambulance Charter</h3>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Dedicated ICU aircraft for bed-to-bed transfer</li>
-      <li>Ideal for long-distance evacuations and high-dependency patients</li>
-    </ul>
-

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Algeria?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Algeria provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation by fully equipped aircraft for patients who require urgent or
-      specialized medical care, ensuring safe domestic or international transfer.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services across Algeria?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides air ambulance services across Algeria, including
-      Algiers and major regions, as well as international medical evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. How much does an air ambulance cost in Algeria?</h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance, aircraft type, medical condition, and care level.
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers a free medical assessment and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Algeria?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in international medical evacuation from Algeria to Europe,
-      UAE, India, and other destinations with complete coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Algeria?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency response, North Africa and
-      international evacuation expertise, fully ICU-equipped aircraft, experienced
-      medical teams, transparent pricing, and compassionate patient care.
-    </p>

-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Andorra?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Andorra provides urgent medical transportation by
-      specially equipped aircraft or helicopter for patients who require immediate or
-      specialized medical care, often transferring patients to advanced hospitals in
-      nearby European countries.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Andorra?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides air ambulance and medical evacuation services from
-      Andorra, coordinating helicopter and fixed-wing transfers via nearby airports and
-      medical hubs.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Andorra?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services are crucial due to Andorra's mountainous terrain, limited
-      local access to advanced medical facilities, and the need for rapid transfer to
-      specialized hospitals in France or Spain.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Andorra?</h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance, aircraft type, patient condition, and medical care
-      required. Air Medical 24X7 provides a free medical review and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Andorra?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We arrange international medical evacuation from Andorra to France, Spain,
-      Germany, UK, Italy, UAE, India, and other destinations.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Andorra?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services can often be arranged within hours, subject to medical
-      clearance, aircraft availability, and weather conditions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance services are ideal for ICU, trauma, stroke, cardiac, and
-      high-risk patients, providing continuous ICU-level care during transfer.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Andorra?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides complete bed-to-bed service including ground or
-      helicopter pickup, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Andorra?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Required documents usually include medical reports, passport or ID copies,
-      fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter for international transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance medical transfers from Andorra?
-    </h3>
-    <p>

-      medical transportation when advanced medical care is required.

-    <!-- PAGE TITLE -->
-    <h2 class="display-4 mb-4">
-      Air Ambulance Services in Angola
-    </h2>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides FAA-approved ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7
-      from Angola to over 195 global destinations. We ensure fast, reliable, and
-      cost-effective medical evacuation with expert critical care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 delivers emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets,
-      and international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Luanda,
-      Benguela, Huambo, Lubango, and all major regions of Angola.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and affordable air ambulance solutions for
-      critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and long-distance
-      medical evacuations. Whether you need a private ICU air ambulance or a commercial
-      stretcher service, our experienced medical teams ensure uninterrupted care from
-      bedside pickup to final destination.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- WHY CHOOSE -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Why Choose Air Medical 24X7 in Angola
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">24/7 Emergency Response</h3>
-    <p>
-      Immediate access to air ambulance services anywhere in Angola, including remote
-      and rural areas.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Global Coverage</h3>
-    <p>
-      International connections to over 100 countries including Portugal, South Africa,
-      France, Germany, UK, USA, and UAE.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Specialist Medical Teams</h3>
-    <p>
-      Highly trained critical care doctors, ICU nurses, and paramedics on every mission.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">ICU-Configured Aircraft</h3>
-    <p>
-      Advanced air ambulance jets and aircraft equipped with ventilators, monitors,
-      infusion pumps, and life-saving equipment.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Rapid Medical Evacuation</h3>
-    <p>

-      and humanitarian evacuations.
-    </p>

-    <!-- COST -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Cost of Air Ambulance in Angola
-    </h2>
-
-    <p>Air ambulance costs in Angola depend on several factors:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Type of aircraft</li>
-      <li>Distance and destination</li>
-      <li>Medical equipment required</li>
-      <li>Patient's medical condition</li>
-      <li>Size and expertise of the medical team</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides transparent and competitive pricing with no hidden charges.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- SERVICES -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Our Air Ambulance Services in Angola
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Emergency Medical Flights</h3>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Immediate ICU air evacuation for critical patients</li>
-      <li>Departures from Quatro de Fevereiro Airport (Luanda) and regional airstrips</li>
-      <li>Continuous monitoring and critical care during flight</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Medical Repatriation Flights</h3>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Safe return of patients to their home country</li>
-      <li>Complete coordination including documentation, permissions, visas, and ground ambulance services</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Commercial Airline Stretcher Services</h3>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Cost-effective solution for stable patients</li>
-      <li>Medical escort, airline approvals, and full coordination</li>
-      <li>Available on select international routes from Angola</li>
-    </ul>
-

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Angola?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Angola provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation by fully equipped aircraft for patients who require urgent or
-      advanced medical care. It is commonly used for international medical evacuation
-      to specialized hospitals abroad.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Luanda and across Angola?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides air ambulance and medical evacuation services
-      across Angola, including Luanda and major regions, subject to medical clearance
-      and aviation permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Angola?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services are critical in Angola due to long travel distances,
-      limited access to advanced specialty care in some regions, and the need for
-      urgent evacuation in critical cases.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Angola?</h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on destination, aircraft type, patient condition, and level
-      of medical care required. Air Medical 24X7 provides a free medical evaluation
-      and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Angola?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We arrange international medical evacuation from Angola to South Africa,
-      UAE, Europe, India, and other medical hubs, managing the entire process.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Angola?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services can often be arranged within hours, subject to medical
-      clearance, aircraft availability, and flight approvals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Angola?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We provide complete bed-to-bed transfer including ground ambulance,
-      hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Angola?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Required documents typically include medical reports, passport and visa copies,
-      fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter for international transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance medical transfers from Angola?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest methods for transporting
-      critically ill patients over long distances with continuous medical care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Angola?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency response, Africa and international
-      evacuation expertise, fully ICU-equipped aircraft, experienced medical teams,
-      transparent pricing, and compassionate patient care.
-    </p>

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Antigua and Barbuda
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      1. What is an air ambulance service in Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Antigua and Barbuda provides urgent medical
-      transportation using specially equipped aircraft for patients who require
-      advanced medical care not always available locally, ensuring safe transfer
-      to regional or international hospitals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 offers Air Ambulance Services in Antigua and Barbuda,
-      coordinating transfers from St. John's and VC Bird International Airport
-      for both regional and international destinations.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      3. Why is air ambulance important in Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services are vital because Antigua and Barbuda is a small island
-      nation, advanced specialty treatment may require off-island care, and many
-      patients are tourists or international travelers. Air ambulance ensures fast,
-      safe, and medically supervised evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on destination, aircraft type, patient condition, and required
-      medical equipment and team. Air Medical 24X7 provides a free medical review and
-      transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in International Medical Evacuation Services in Antigua and
-      Barbuda to the USA, Canada, UK, Europe, India, and other global medical hubs.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Our team operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance flights within hours,
-      subject to medical clearance and flight permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We offer complete bed-to-bed medical ambulance service, including ground
-      ambulance, airport coordination, air transfer, and hospital handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Required documents typically include medical reports, passport and visa copies,
-      fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter. We assist with all
-      documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance transfers from Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Medical Air Ambulance Services in Antigua and Barbuda are among the safest
-      options for long-distance transfers, with continuous medical supervision.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Antigua and Barbuda?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency availability, Caribbean and
-      international evacuation expertise, ICU-equipped aircraft, skilled medical
-      professionals, transparent pricing, and compassionate, patient-focused care.
-    </p>

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Argentina
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      1. What is an air ambulance service in Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Argentina provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft for patients who need urgent
-      or specialized care, ensuring safe domestic or international transfer with
-      continuous medical supervision.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Buenos Aires and across Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides Air Ambulance Services Argentina, covering
-      Buenos Aires, major cities, and international medical evacuation to and
-      from Argentina.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      3. How much does an air ambulance cost in Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance and destination, aircraft type, patient's
-      medical condition, and level of medical care required. Air Medical 24X7
-      provides a free medical assessment and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in Medical Evacuation Service Argentina to the USA,
-      Canada, Europe, UK, India, UAE, and other Latin American destinations,
-      managing full medical and logistical coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance flights within
-      a few hours, subject to medical clearance and aviation approvals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We provide complete bed-to-bed medical transfer, including ground
-      ambulance pickup in Argentina, hospital coordination, air transfer, and
-      safe hospital handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Typically required documents include patient medical reports, passport and
-      visa copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter. Our
-      team assists with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance medical transfers from Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Ambulance Service in Argentina is one of the safest and fastest
-      methods for long-distance medical transportation with continuous critical
-      care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. Can insurance cover air ambulance services in Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Some travel, corporate, or international insurance policies may cover air
-      ambulance services. Air Medical 24X7 can assist with insurance coordination
-      based on policy terms.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Argentina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency response, Latin America and
-      international evacuation expertise, fully ICU-equipped aircraft, skilled
-      medical professionals, transparent pricing, and compassionate,
-      patient-focused care.
-    </p>

-      <li>Air ambulance services across regional Armenia</li>
-      <li>Nationwide Armenia Ambulance and medical support</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Armenia
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      1. What is an air ambulance service in Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Armenia provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft for patients who need urgent
-      or specialized medical care, ensuring safe domestic or international
-      transfer with continuous medical supervision.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Yerevan and across Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides Air Ambulance Services Armenia, covering
-      Yerevan, major regions, and international medical evacuation to and from
-      Armenia.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      3. How much does an air ambulance cost in Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance and destination, aircraft type, patient's
-      medical condition, and level of medical care required. Air Medical 24X7
-      provides a free medical assessment and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in Medical Evacuation Service Armenia to Russia,
-      Germany, France, Italy, UK, UAE, India, and the USA, managing complete
-      medical and logistical coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance flights within
-      a few hours, subject to medical clearance and aviation permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We provide complete bed-to-bed medical transfer, including ground
-      ambulance pickup in Armenia, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe
-      handover at the receiving hospital.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Commonly required documents include patient medical reports, passport and
-      visa copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter. Our
-      team assists with all required documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance medical transfers from Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Ambulance Service in Armenia is one of the safest and fastest
-      methods for long-distance medical transportation, especially when advanced
-      care is required during transit.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. Can insurance cover air ambulance services in Armenia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Some international, travel, or corporate insurance policies may cover air
-      ambulance services. Air Medical 24X7 can assist with insurance coordination
-      based on policy terms.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Armenia?
-    </h3>

-      international evacuation expertise, fully ICU-equipped aircraft, highly
-      trained medical teams, transparent pricing, and compassionate,
-      patient-focused care.

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Australia
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Australia?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Australia provides urgent and planned medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft for long-distance domestic
-      transfers, remote-area evacuations, and international medical flights.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Australia?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides Air Ambulance Services Australia covering
-      major cities, rural areas, remote regions, and international medical transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Australia?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Large geographic distances, remote regions, and limited access to specialized
-      hospitals make air ambulance services essential for safe and rapid care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Australia?</h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance, aircraft type, patient condition, and required
-      medical care. A free medical assessment and transparent quotation is provided.
-    </p>
-
-
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Australia?</h3>
-    <p>
-Yes. We specialize in International Air Ambulance Australia, arranging evacuations to India, UAE, UK, Europe, USA, Asia, 
-and the Pacific region with complete coordination. </p>
-
-
- <h3 class="h5 mt-4">6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Australia?</h3>
-    <p>
-Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services within hours, 
-subject to medical clearance and aviation approvals.</p>
-
-
-<h3 class="h5 mt-4">7. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Australia?</h3>
-    <p>Yes. We offer complete bed-to-bed medical transfer, including:</p>
-    <p>Ground ambulance pickup</p>
-    <p>Hospital coordination</p>
-    <p>Air transfer</p>
-    <p>Safe handover at the receiving hospital</p>
-
-
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">8. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Australia?</h3>
-    <p>Typically required documents include: </p>
-    <p>Patient medical reports</p>
-    <p>Passport and visa copies (for international transfers)</p>
-    <p>Fit-to-fly certificate</p>
-    <p>Hospital acceptance letter (if applicable)</p>
-
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">9. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance medical transfers in Australia?</h3>

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Austria
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Austria?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Austria provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft or helicopters for patients
-      who need urgent or specialized care, including cross-border European and
-      international transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Vienna and across Austria?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides Air Ambulance Services Austria, covering
-      Vienna, Salzburg, Innsbruck, and all major regions, as well as international
-      medical evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Austria?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Alpine and mountainous terrain, winter sports'related injuries, and the
-      need for rapid cross-border European transfers make air ambulance services
-      essential.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Austria?</h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance, aircraft type, patient condition, and level
-      of medical care required. A free medical assessment and transparent
-      quotation is provided.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Austria?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in Medical Repatriation Austria, arranging evacuations
-      to Germany, Switzerland, Italy, France, UK, UAE, India, and the USA with
-      full coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Austria?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services within
-      hours, subject to medical clearance and aviation approvals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">7. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Austria?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We provide complete bed-to-bed medical transfer, including ground
-      ambulance or helicopter pickup, hospital coordination, air transfer, and
-      safe hospital handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Austria?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Commonly required documents include patient medical reports, passport or
-      ID copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter (for
-      international transfers). We assist with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance medical transfers from Austria?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical Evacuation Austria is one of the safest and fastest options
-      for long-distance medical transportation, especially when advanced care is
-      required.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Austria?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency response, expertise in Alpine
-      and European evacuations, fully ICU-equipped aircraft and helicopters,
-      highly trained medical teams, transparent pricing, and compassionate,
-      patient-centered care.

-      Air Ambulance & Ambulance Services - Key Cities in Azerbaijan
-    </h2>
-

-      <li>Air ambulance services from Baku</li>

-      <li>Nationwide Azerbaijan Ambulance and emergency medical coverage</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Azerbaijan
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Azerbaijan?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Azerbaijan provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft for patients who require urgent
-      or specialized care, commonly used for international medical evacuation and
-      cross-border transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Baku and across Azerbaijan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides Air Ambulance Services Azerbaijan, covering
-      Baku, surrounding regions, and international medical transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Azerbaijan?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services are important due to the need for rapid access to
-      advanced medical facilities, cross-border medical transfers to Europe and
-      Asia, and emergency response in remote and industrial regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Azerbaijan?</h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance and destination, aircraft type, patient's
-      medical condition, and level of medical care required. Air Medical 24X7
-      provides a free medical assessment and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Azerbaijan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in Medical Repatriation Azerbaijan, arranging evacuations
-      to Turkey, Germany, Russia, UAE, India, Europe, and the USA with full
-      coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Azerbaijan?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services within
-      a few hours, subject to medical clearance and aviation permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Azerbaijan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Our air ambulance services are suitable for ICU and ventilated patients,
-      trauma and accident cases, stroke and cardiac emergencies, post-surgical and
-      high-risk patients. Patients receive continuous ICU-level monitoring during
-      transport.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Azerbaijan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We provide complete bed-to-bed medical transfer, including ground
-      ambulance pickup in Azerbaijan, hospital coordination, air transfer, and
-      safe hospital handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Azerbaijan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Required documents include patient medical reports, passport and visa
-      copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter (for
-      international transfers). Our team assists with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for international medical transfers from Azerbaijan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical Evacuation Azerbaijan is one of the safest and fastest
-      options for long-distance medical transportation, especially for critically
-      ill patients.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      11. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Azerbaijan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency response, expertise in
-      Caucasus and international evacuations, fully ICU-equipped aircraft, highly
-      trained medical teams, transparent pricing, and compassionate,
-      patient-focused care.
-    </p>

-    <h2 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in the Bahamas</h2>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides dependable, 24/7 Air Ambulance Services Bahamas,
-      delivering fully ICU-equipped aircraft for emergency medical evacuation,
-      inter-island transfers, and international medical repatriation. We ensure
-      fast, safe, and medically supervised transportation throughout the Bahamas
-      and to over 195 global destinations.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Our Air Ambulance Service in the Bahamas operates across Nassau, Freeport,
-      and the outer islands, supporting patients who require advanced medical
-      care in the Bahamas or urgent transfer to specialized facilities abroad.
-      We assist residents, tourists, and cruise passengers with seamless medical
-      air transport.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in Air Ambulance Evacuation Bahamas and Air Medical Evacuation
-      Bahamas, managing trauma cases, cardiac emergencies, stroke patients, and
-      critical illnesses. Whether you require a private air ambulance, medical
-      evacuation service Bahamas, or international air ambulance Bahamas, our
-      expert medical teams provide continuous ICU-level care from island pickup
-      to hospital handover.
-    </p>
-

-    </h2>
-
-    <p>The Air Ambulance Cost Bahamas depends on several important factors:</p>
-
-    <ul>
-      <li>Distance between islands or international destination</li>
-      <li>Type of aircraft required</li>
-      <li>Patient's medical condition</li>
-      <li>Level of onboard medical care</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers transparent pricing, no hidden charges, and a free
-      medical assessment to determine the safest and most cost-effective transfer
-      solution.
-    </p>

-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in the Bahamas
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in the Bahamas?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in the Bahamas provides urgent medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft for patients who need
-      advanced care beyond what is available on certain islands, commonly used
-      for inter-island and international transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services across the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides Air Ambulance Services Bahamas, covering
-      Nassau, Freeport, and outer islands, as well as international medical
-      evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in the Bahamas?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services are essential due to multiple islands with limited
-      advanced medical facilities, need for rapid inter-island transfers, and
-      tourist and cruise-related medical emergencies.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance between islands or international destination,
-      aircraft type, patient's medical condition, and level of medical care
-      required. Air Medical 24X7 provides a free medical assessment and
-      transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in International Air Ambulance Bahamas, arranging
-      evacuations to the USA, Canada, Europe, UAE, India, and Latin America with
-      full coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services within
-      hours, subject to medical clearance and island airport permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Our air ambulance services are ideal for ICU and ventilated patients,
-      cardiac and stroke emergencies, trauma and accident cases, and
-      post-surgical and high-risk transfers. Patients receive continuous
-      ICU-level monitoring during flight.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We offer complete bed-to-bed medical transfer, including ground
-      ambulance pickup on the island, hospital coordination, air transfer, and
-      safe hospital handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Typically required documents include patient medical reports, passport and
-      visa copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter (for
-      international transfers). Our team assists with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for island and international transfers from the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical Evacuation Bahamas is one of the safest and fastest options
-      for medical transportation from islands, especially when advanced care is
-      required.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      11. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in the Bahamas?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency response, expertise in island
-      and international evacuations, fully ICU-equipped aircraft, highly trained
-      medical teams, transparent pricing, and compassionate, patient-centered
-      care.
-    </p>

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>1. What is an air ambulance service in Bahrain?</strong><br>
-      An air ambulance service in Bahrain provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation by fully equipped aircraft for critically ill or injured patients.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Manama and across Bahrain?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 offers air ambulance services throughout Bahrain, including
-      Manama and nearby regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>3. How much does an air ambulance cost in Bahrain?</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Distance and destination</li>
-      <li>Type of aircraft required</li>
-      <li>Patient's medical condition</li>
-      <li>Medical equipment and team needed</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides a free medical review and quotation before confirming
-      the service.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>4. What medical equipment is available on Air Medical 24X7 aircraft?</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>ICU-level medical setup</li>
-      <li>Ventilators and oxygen systems</li>
-      <li>Cardiac monitors and infusion pumps</li>
-      <li>Emergency medications</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Bahrain?</strong><br>
-      Yes. We specialize in international medical evacuation from Bahrain to global
-      destinations.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Bahrain?</strong><br>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange services within a few hours.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU, ventilated, or critical patients?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Continuous monitoring and ICU-level care are provided throughout the flight.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Bahrain?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Complete bed-to-bed medical transfer is provided.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Bahrain?</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Patient medical reports</li>
-      <li>Passport and visa copies</li>
-      <li>Fit-to-fly certificate</li>
-      <li>Hospital acceptance letter</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>10. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance medical transfers from Bahrain?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is among the safest and fastest transport options.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>11. Can insurance cover air ambulance services in Bahrain?</strong><br>
-      Some insurance plans may cover air ambulance services. Assistance is provided.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>12. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Bahrain?</strong><br>
-      24/7 emergency response, global expertise, ICU-equipped aircraft, trained medical
-      teams, transparent pricing, and compassionate care.
-    </p>

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Bangladesh
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Bangladesh?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Bangladesh provides urgent and planned medical
-      transportation by fully equipped aircraft for patients who require
-      advanced or specialized medical care. It is used for intercity transfers
-      and International Air Ambulance Bangladesh.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Dhaka and across Bangladesh?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides Air Ambulance Bangladesh, covering Dhaka,
-      Chattogram, Sylhet, Khulna, and other regions, as well as international
-      transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Bangladesh?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services are critical due to high population density and
-      traffic congestion, need for rapid access to advanced medical facilities,
-      and emergency evacuation for critical or complex medical cases.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Bangladesh?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The Air Ambulance Cost in Bangladesh depends on distance and destination,
-      type of aircraft, patient's medical condition, and level of medical care
-      required. Air Medical 24X7 provides a free medical assessment and
-      transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Bangladesh?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in International Air Ambulance Bangladesh, transferring
-      patients to India, Thailand, Singapore, UAE, Europe, USA, and more,
-      handling all medical and logistical coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Bangladesh?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services
-      within hours, subject to medical clearance, aircraft availability, and
-      aviation approvals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Bangladesh?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Ideal for ICU and ventilated patients, stroke and cardiac
-      emergencies, trauma and accident cases, and post-surgical or high-risk
-      transfers. Patients receive continuous ICU-level monitoring during
-      transit.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Bangladesh?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Complete bed-to-bed medical transfer includes ground ambulance
-      pickup, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover at the
-      receiving hospital.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Bangladesh?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Typically required patient medical reports, passport and visa copies,
-      fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter (for international
-      transfers). Our team assists with all documentation and approvals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance and international transfers from Bangladesh?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical Evacuation Bangladesh is one of the safest and fastest
-      methods, especially for critically ill patients.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">

-      patient-focused care.

-    <h2 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Barbados</h2>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved, ICU-equipped Air Ambulance Barbados
-      services 24/7 from Barbados to over 195 global destinations. Fast,
-      reliable, and affordable medical evacuation with expert care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We deliver emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets, and
-      international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across
-      Bridgetown and all major regions of Barbados.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and cost-effective air ambulance
-      solutions for critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital
-      transfers, and long-distance medevac. Whether you need a private ICU air
-      ambulance or a commercial stretcher service, our experienced medical
-      teams provide uninterrupted care from takeoff to landing.
-    </p>
-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Why Choose Air Medical 24X7 in Barbados
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">24/7 Emergency Response</h3>
-    <p>
-      Immediate access to air ambulance services anywhere in Barbados,
-      including Bridgetown, Holetown, Speightstown, and beyond.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Global Coverage</h3>
-    <p>
-      Connect to over 100 countries including USA, Canada, Europe, India, UAE,
-      and Latin America.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Specialist Medical Teams</h3>
-    <p>
-      Critical care doctors, ICU nurses, and paramedics on every flight.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">ICU-Configured Aircraft</h3>
-    <p>
-      Fleet of medically equipped jets and air ambulance planes.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">Rapid Medical Evacuation</h3>
-    <p>
-      Quick mobilization for medical emergencies, trauma patients, neonatal
-      transfers, and organ retrieval.
-    </p>
-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Cost of Air Ambulance in Barbados
-    </h2>
-
-    <p>Air ambulance costs in Barbados depend on several factors:</p>
-
-    <ul>
-      <li>Type of Aircraft</li>
-      <li>Distance and Destination</li>
-      <li>Medical Equipment Required</li>
-      <li>Condition of the Patient</li>
-      <li>Size and Expertise of Medical Team</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden
-      charges.
-    </p>
-

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Barbados
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Barbados?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Barbados provides urgent and planned medical
-      transportation by fully equipped aircraft for patients who require
-      advanced care beyond local availability. It is commonly used for
-      inter-island transfers and International Air Ambulance Barbados.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Bridgetown and across Barbados?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides Air Ambulance Barbados, covering
-      Bridgetown, Holetown, Speightstown, and other regions, as well as
-      international transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Barbados?</h3>
-    <p>Air ambulance services are essential due to:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Limited advanced medical facilities for critical cases</li>
-      <li>Tourist and cruise-related medical emergencies</li>
-      <li>Rapid evacuation to specialized hospitals abroad</li>
-    </ul>
-    <p>
-      It ensures fast, safe, and medically supervised transportation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Barbados?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The Air Ambulance Cost Barbados depends on distance and international
-      destination, type of aircraft required, patient's medical condition,
-      and level of onboard medical care. Air Medical 24X7 provides a free
-      medical assessment and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Barbados?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in International Air Ambulance Barbados, transferring
-      patients to USA, Canada, Europe, India, UAE, and other destinations,
-      handling complete medical and flight coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Barbados?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services
-      within hours, subject to medical clearance, aircraft availability, and
-      airport permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Barbados?
-    </h3>
-    <p>Yes. Ideal for:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>ICU and ventilated patients</li>
-      <li>Cardiac and stroke emergencies</li>
-      <li>Trauma and accident cases</li>
-      <li>Post-surgical or high-risk transfers</li>
-    </ul>
-    <p>
-      Patients receive continuous ICU-level monitoring during the journey.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Barbados?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Complete bed-to-bed medical transfer includes ground ambulance
-      pickup in Barbados, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe
-      handover at the receiving hospital.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Barbados?
-    </h3>
-    <p>Typically required:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Patient medical reports</li>
-      <li>Passport and visa copies</li>
-      <li>Fit-to-fly certificate</li>
-      <li>
-        Hospital acceptance letter (for international transfers)
-      </li>
-    </ul>
-    <p>
-      Our team assists with all documentation and approvals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for international medical transfers from Barbados?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest options for medical
-      transportation from island nations, especially for critically ill
-      patients.
-    </p>

-    <h2 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Belarus</h2>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides FAA-approved, ICU-equipped Air Ambulance Belarus
-      services 24/7 from Belarus to over 195 global destinations. Fast,
-      reliable, and affordable medical evacuation with expert care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We deliver emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets, and
-      international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Minsk
-      and all major regions of Belarus.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and cost-effective air ambulance
-      solutions for critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital
-      transfers, and long-distance medevac. Whether you need a private ICU air
-      ambulance or a commercial stretcher service, our experienced medical
-      teams provide uninterrupted care from takeoff to landing.
-    </p>

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Belarus
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Belarus?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Belarus provides emergency and planned
-      medical transportation by fully equipped aircraft for patients who
-      require urgent or specialized medical care. It is widely used for
-      Medical Evacuation Service Belarus and cross-border transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Minsk and across Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides ambulance service Belarus and
-      international medical evacuation across Minsk, Gomel, Brest, and other
-      regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Belarus?</h3>
-    <p>Air ambulance services are essential due to:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Need for rapid access to advanced medical facilities</li>
-      <li>Cross-border medical transfers within Europe</li>
-      <li>Emergency response for critical or complex medical cases</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The Air Ambulance Belarus Cost depends on distance, type of aircraft,
-      patient condition, and level of medical care required. Air Medical 24X7
-      provides free assessment and transparent quotes.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in international air ambulance services from Belarus
-      to Germany, Poland, Turkey, Italy, UK, UAE, India, USA, and Europe.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      We operate 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services within hours,
-      depending on medical clearance, aircraft availability, and aviation
-      permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Our services are ideal for ICU, ventilated, trauma, cardiac,
-      stroke, post-surgical, and high-risk transfers with continuous
-      monitoring.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Complete bed-to-bed transfers include ground ambulance pickup,
-      hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover at the
-      receiving facility.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Required documents typically include patient medical reports,
-      passport/ID copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance
-      letter for international transfers. Our team assists with all
-      documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for international medical transfers from Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest options for patients
-      requiring continuous medical care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      11. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Belarus?
-    </h3>
-    <p>Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>24/7 emergency response</li>
-      <li>Expertise in Eastern Europe evacuations</li>
-      <li>Fully ICU-equipped aircraft</li>
-      <li>Highly trained medical teams</li>
-      <li>Transparent pricing</li>
-      <li>Compassionate, patient-focused care</li>
-    </ul>

-    <h2 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Belgium</h2>

-    <p>

-    </p>

-      Belgium for critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers,

-      Air Ambulance Services in Belgium

-    </ul>
-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance Belgium
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Belgium?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Belgium provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation by fully equipped aircraft or helicopter for patients
-      requiring urgent or specialized medical care. It is widely used for
-      Medical Evacuation Service Belgium and cross-border transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Brussels and across Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides ambulance service Belgium and international
-      medical evacuation across Brussels, Antwerp, Ghent, and other regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Belgium?</h3>
-    <p>Air ambulance services are vital due to:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>High demand for rapid cross-border medical transfers within the EU</li>
-      <li>Need for specialized treatment at advanced medical centers</li>
-      <li>Emergency evacuation for critical or complex medical cases</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The Air Ambulance Cost Belgium depends on distance, type of aircraft,
-      patient condition, and level of medical care required. Air Medical 24X7
-      provides free assessment and transparent quotes.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in International Air Ambulance Belgium services to
-      Germany, France, Netherlands, UK, Switzerland, UAE, India, and the USA.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services within
-      hours, depending on medical clearance, aircraft availability, and aviation
-      approvals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU, trauma, or critical patients in Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Our services are ideal for ICU, ventilated, trauma, cardiac, stroke,
-      post-surgical, and high-risk transfers with continuous monitoring.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Complete bed-to-bed transfers include ground ambulance or helicopter
-      pickup, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover at the
-      receiving facility.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Required documents typically include patient medical reports, passport/ID
-      copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter for
-      international transfers. Our team assists with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance medical transfers from Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest medical transportation
-      methods, especially for patients requiring continuous medical care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      11. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Belgium?
-    </h3>
-    <p>Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>24/7 emergency response</li>
-      <li>Expertise in Western Europe and EU evacuations</li>
-      <li>Fully ICU-equipped aircraft</li>
-      <li>Highly trained medical teams</li>
-      <li>Transparent pricing</li>
-      <li>Compassionate, patient-focused care</li>
-    </ul>

-    <h2 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Belize</h2>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers world-class, ICU-equipped air ambulance services in
-      Belize, providing 24/7 emergency response and international medical
-      evacuation to over 195 global destinations. Our services ensure fast,
-      safe, and medically supervised transportation for patients requiring
-      urgent or specialized care.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      With extensive experience in Medical Care Belize and Belize Health Care
-      logistics, Air Medical 24X7 supports patients, tourists, expatriates, and
-      residents requiring advanced Medical Services in Belize or overseas
-      treatment. We operate across Belize City and regional airports, ensuring
-      rapid access to Air Medical in Belize even from remote locations.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Our expertise includes Medical Emergency Belize, trauma care,
-      inter-hospital transfers, ICU evacuations, and long-distance medical
-      repatriation. Whether it's a private ICU jet, Medical Air Ambulance in
-      Belize, or a cost-effective commercial stretcher service, our highly
-      trained medical teams provide continuous monitoring from bedside to
-      bedside.
-    </p>

-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Belize
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Belize?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Belize provides urgent and planned medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft for patients who need
-      advanced or specialized care not available locally. It is used for both
-      domestic transfers and international medical evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services across Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides air ambulance in Belize, including Belize
-      City, regional airports, and international medical transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is the air ambulance important in Belize?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulance services are vital in Belize due to limited advanced medical
-      facilities, medical emergencies involving tourists and expatriates, and
-      the need for rapid evacuation to specialized hospitals abroad.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The Air Ambulance Cost Belize depends on distance, aircraft type, medical
-      condition, onboard care level, and destination. Air Medical 24X7 provides
-      a free assessment and transparent pricing.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in Medical Repatriation Belize and international
-      evacuation to the USA, Canada, Mexico, Europe, India, and UAE, handling
-      all medical and flight coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 and can arrange air ambulance services
-      within hours, subject to medical clearance, aircraft availability, and
-      airport permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Medical Air Ambulance in Belize is ideal for ICU patients,
-      ventilated cases, trauma, stroke, cardiac emergencies, and high-risk
-      transfers with continuous ICU monitoring.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We offer complete bed-to-bed service including Ambulance Service
-      Belize, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover at the
-      receiving hospital.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Required documents include medical reports, passport and visa copies,
-      fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital acceptance letter. Our team assists
-      with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for international medical transfers from Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest methods for
-      transporting critically ill patients requiring advanced medical care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      11. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Belize?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency response, expertise in
-      Belize Medical Care, ICU-equipped aircraft, skilled medical teams,
-      transparent pricing, and compassionate patient-focused service.
-    </p>

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Benin
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Benin?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Benin provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft for patients requiring
-      urgent or specialized care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Cotonou and across Benin?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 operates air ambulance and medical evacuation
-      services across Benin, including Cotonou and other regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Benin?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Due to limited advanced medical facilities, the need for rapid
-      evacuation, and cross-border transfers, Air Ambulance in Benin is
-      essential for safe and timely care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Benin?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance, aircraft type, patient condition, and
-      onboard medical care. Air Medical 24X7 provides a free assessment and
-      transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Benin?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We manage complete international evacuation to destinations such as
-      France, Germany, South Africa, Morocco, UAE, India, and the USA.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Benin?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Our 24/7 operations allow air ambulance arrangements within hours,
-      subject to medical clearance and aviation permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Benin?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Ambulance Benin is ideal for ICU, ventilated, trauma, stroke,
-      cardiac, and high-risk post-surgical patients.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Benin?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We provide complete bed-to-bed transfer including Ambulance Service
-      Benin, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Benin?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Medical reports, passport and visa copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and
-      hospital acceptance letter. Our team assists with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for international medical transfers from Benin?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest medical transport
-      options for patients requiring advanced care.
-    </p>

-    <p>

-      ICU-equipped aircraft, skilled medical teams, transparent pricing, and
-      compassionate care.

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Bhutan
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Bhutan?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Bhutan provides urgent medical transportation
-      using fully equipped aircraft for patients requiring critical or
-      specialized care, especially in high-altitude emergencies.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services across Bhutan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 operates across Bhutan, including Paro, Thimphu,
-      Punakha, Phuentsholing, and surrounding regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Bhutan?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Due to mountainous terrain, limited road connectivity, challenging
-      weather, and the need for rapid evacuation, Air Ambulance in Bhutan is
-      essential for safe and timely medical transport.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Bhutan?</h3>
-    <p>
-      The cost depends on distance, aircraft type, medical condition, and ICU
-      care requirements. Air Medical 24X7 provides a free assessment and
-      transparent pricing.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. What medical facilities are available onboard Air Medical 24X7 aircraft?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Aircraft are equipped with ICU-level medical equipment, ventilators,
-      cardiac monitors, infusion pumps, emergency medications, and staffed by
-      experienced medical professionals.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Bhutan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We specialize in evacuation to India, Thailand, Singapore, UAE,
-      Europe, and the USA, managing all coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">7. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Bhutan?</h3>
-    <p>
-      We can arrange services within hours, subject to medical clearance,
-      aircraft availability, weather, and aviation permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Bhutan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Ambulance Bhutan is ideal for ICU patients, altitude sickness,
-      trauma, respiratory emergencies, and post-surgical transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Bhutan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We offer complete bed-to-bed transfer including ground ambulance
-      pickup, hospital coordination, air transport, and safe handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Bhutan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Medical reports, passport and visa copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and
-      hospital acceptance letter are required. We assist with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      11. Is air ambulance safe for international medical transfers from Bhutan?
-    </h3>
-    <p>

-      methods, especially for patients unable to travel commercially.
-    </p>
