-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Bolivia
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Bolivia?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Bolivia provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation using fully equipped aircraft for patients requiring
-      urgent or specialized care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services across Bolivia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 operates across Bolivia, including La Paz, Santa
-      Cruz, Cochabamba, and remote regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Bolivia?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Due to high-altitude cities, mountainous terrain, and limited access to
-      advanced care, Air Ambulance in Bolivia is essential for rapid and safe
-      evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Bolivia?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Costs depend on distance, aircraft type, medical condition, and ICU care.
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides a free assessment and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from
-      Bolivia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We manage international evacuations to USA, Brazil, Chile,
-      Argentina, Europe, India, and UAE.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Bolivia?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulances can be arranged within hours, subject to medical clearance,
-      aircraft availability, altitude factors, and aviation permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Bolivia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Ambulance Bolivia is ideal for ICU patients, altitude
-      emergencies, trauma, cardiac, stroke, and post-surgical cases.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Bolivia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We provide complete bed-to-bed service including ground ambulance
-      pickup, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Bolivia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Medical reports, passport and visa copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and
-      hospital acceptance letter are required. We assist with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for international medical transfers from Bolivia?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest medical transport
-      options, especially when altitude and medical complexity are involved.
-    </p>

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">
-      Frequently Asked Questions - Air Ambulance in Bosnia and Herzegovina
-    </h2>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">1. What is an air ambulance service in Bosnia and Herzegovina?</h3>
-    <p>
-      An air ambulance service in Bosnia and Herzegovina provides emergency and planned
-      medical transportation using fully equipped aircraft for patients requiring urgent
-      or specialized care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services across Bosnia and Herzegovina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 operates across Bosnia and Herzegovina, including Sarajevo,
-      Banja Luka, Mostar, and surrounding regions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">3. Why is air ambulance important in Bosnia and Herzegovina?</h3>
-    <p>
-      Due to mountainous terrain, remote areas, and the need for rapid European cross-border
-      transfers, Air Ambulance Bosnia and Herzegovina is essential for timely and safe evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      4. How much does an air ambulance cost in Bosnia and Herzegovina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Costs depend on distance, aircraft type, medical condition, and ICU care requirements.
-      Air Medical 24X7 provides a free assessment and transparent quotation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Bosnia and Herzegovina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We manage international evacuations to Germany, Austria, Italy, Switzerland,
-      France, UK, UAE, India, and the USA.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      6. How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged in Bosnia and Herzegovina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Air ambulances can be arranged within a few hours, subject to medical clearance,
-      aircraft availability, and aviation permissions.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients in Bosnia and Herzegovina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air Ambulance Services Bosnia and Herzegovina are ideal for ICU, ventilated,
-      trauma, cardiac, stroke, and post-surgical patients.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Bosnia and Herzegovina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. We provide complete bed-to-bed service including ground ambulance pickup,
-      hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      9. What documents are required for air ambulance transfer from Bosnia and Herzegovina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Medical reports, passport and visa copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital
-      acceptance letter are required. We assist with all documentation.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      10. Is air ambulance safe for international medical transfers from Bosnia and Herzegovina?
-    </h3>
-    <p>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest medical transport options for
-      patients needing continuous care.
-    </p>
-
-    <h3 class="h5 mt-4">
-      11. Why choose Air Medical 24X7 for air ambulance services in Bosnia and Herzegovina?

-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is trusted for 24/7 emergency response, Balkan and European evacuation
-      expertise, ICU-equipped aircraft, skilled medical teams, transparent pricing,
-      and compassionate care.

-    <!-- PAGE TITLE -->
-    <h1 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Ethiopia</h1>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved, ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7
-      from Ethiopia to over 195 global destinations. Fast, reliable, and affordable
-      medical evacuation with expert care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- WHY CHOOSE -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Why Choose Air Medical 24X7 in Ethiopia</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>24/7 Emergency Response</strong><br>
-      Immediate access to air ambulance services anywhere in Ethiopia, including
-      Addis Ababa, Dire Dawa, Mekelle, and beyond.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Global Coverage</strong><br>
-      Connect to over 100 countries including India, UK, Germany, USA, UAE,
-      Saudi Arabia, and Southeast Asia.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Specialist Medical Teams</strong><br>
-      Critical care doctors, ICU nurses, and paramedics on every flight.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>ICU-Configured Aircraft</strong><br>
-      Fleet of medically equipped jets and air ambulance planes.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Rapid Medical Evacuation</strong><br>
-      Quick mobilization for medical emergencies, trauma patients, neonatal transport,
-      and organ retrieval.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- COST -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Cost of Air Ambulance in Ethiopia</h2>
-
-    <p>Air ambulance costs in Ethiopia depend on several factors:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Type of Aircraft</li>
-      <li>Distance and Destination</li>
-      <li>Medical Equipment Required</li>
-      <li>Condition of the Patient</li>
-      <li>Size and Expertise of Medical Team</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden charges.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- SERVICES -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Our Air Ambulance Services in Ethiopia</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>Emergency Medical Flights</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Immediate ICU air evacuation for critical patients</li>
-      <li>Takeoff from Addis Ababa Bole International Airport or regional airstrips</li>
-      <li>Fully monitored care throughout the journey</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>Medical Repatriation Flights</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Safe return of patients to their home countries</li>
-      <li>Complete end-to-end coordination, visa formalities, and ground transport</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>Commercial Airline Stretcher Services</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Cost-effective option for stable patients</li>
-      <li>Includes medical escort, airline coordination, and documentation</li>
-      <li>Available on select international flights from Ethiopia</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>Private Air Ambulance Charter</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Dedicated ICU aircraft for bed-to-bed patient transfer</li>
-      <li>Ideal for long-distance transfers and high-dependency cases</li>
-    </ul>
-

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>1. What is an air ambulance service in Ethiopia?</strong><br>
-      An air ambulance service in Ethiopia provides emergency and non-emergency medical
-      transportation with ICU-equipped aircraft and trained medical teams.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>2. Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Addis Ababa and across Ethiopia?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 operates across Ethiopia and provides international medical
-      evacuations.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>3. How much does an air ambulance cost in Ethiopia?</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Distance and destination</li>
-      <li>Type of aircraft used</li>
-      <li>Patient's medical condition</li>
-      <li>Medical equipment and team required</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>4. What medical facilities are available onboard?</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>ICU-level medical setup</li>
-      <li>Ventilators and oxygen systems</li>
-      <li>Cardiac monitors and infusion pumps</li>
-      <li>Emergency medicines</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>5. Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation from Ethiopia?</strong><br>
-      Yes. We manage complete international medical evacuation logistics.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>6. How fast can an air ambulance be arranged in Ethiopia?</strong><br>
-      Services can be arranged within hours, subject to approvals and availability.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>7. Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or critical patients?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Continuous ICU-level monitoring is provided throughout the journey.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>8. Do you provide bed-to-bed air ambulance service in Ethiopia?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Ground pickup, air transfer, and hospital handover are included.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>9. What documents are required?</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Patient medical reports</li>
-      <li>Passport and visa copies</li>
-      <li>Fit-to-fly certificate</li>
-      <li>Hospital acceptance letter</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>10. Is air ambulance safe for long-distance transfers?</strong><br>
-      Yes. It is one of the safest and fastest transport methods.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>11. Can insurance cover air ambulance services?</strong><br>
-      Some insurance policies may cover the service.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>12. Why choose Air Medical 24X7?</strong><br>
-      24/7 availability, ICU-equipped aircraft, experienced teams, transparent pricing,
-      and compassionate care.
-    </p>

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>How Much Do Ambulances Cost Around the World?</strong><br>
-      Ambulance costs vary globally based on distance and medical care. The ambulance
-      price in Indonesia is generally affordable for ground services, while air
-      ambulance costs are higher due to aircraft, medical staff, and equipment.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How Does an Air Ambulance Service in Indonesia Work?</strong><br>
-      Air Medical 24X7 manages medical evaluation, flight approvals, and hospital
-      coordination for smooth medical evacuation services.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>When Should You Use an Air Ambulance Service in Indonesia?</strong><br>
-      Use air ambulance services for critical emergencies, inter-island transfers,
-      or when advanced medical care is unavailable locally.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Who Can Book an Air Ambulance Service in Indonesia?</strong><br>
-      Patients, families, hospitals, insurers, and embassies can book services with
-      24/7 support.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>What Medical Facilities Are Available on an Air Ambulance Service?</strong><br>
-      ICU-level medical services including ventilators, monitors, oxygen, and trained
-      doctors are available onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How Fast Can an Air Ambulance Be Arranged?</strong><br>
-      Air Medical 24X7 can arrange air ambulance services within hours.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>What Is the Cost of an Air Ambulance Service in Indonesia?</strong><br>
-      Cost depends on distance, aircraft type, and patient condition. Transparent
-      pricing is provided before confirmation.
-    </p>
-

-    <!-- PAGE TITLE -->
-    <h1 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Kuwait</h1>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved, ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7
-      from Kuwait to over 195 global destinations. Fast, reliable, and affordable
-      medical evacuation with expert care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 delivers emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets,
-      and international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Kuwait
-      City and all major regions of Kuwait.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and cost-effective air ambulance solutions for
-      critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and long-distance
-      medevac. Whether you need a private ICU air ambulance or a commercial stretcher
-      service, our experienced medical teams provide uninterrupted care from takeoff
-      to landing.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- WHY CHOOSE -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Why Choose Air Medical 24X7 in Kuwait</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>24/7 Emergency Response</strong><br>
-      Immediate access to air ambulance services anywhere in Kuwait, including
-      Kuwait City, Al Ahmadi, Hawally, and beyond.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Global Coverage</strong><br>
-      Connect to over 100 countries including India, UAE, UK, Germany, USA,
-      Saudi Arabia, and Bahrain.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Specialist Medical Teams</strong><br>
-      Critical care doctors, ICU nurses, and paramedics on every flight.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>ICU-Configured Aircraft</strong><br>
-      Fleet of medically equipped jets and air ambulance planes.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Rapid Medical Evacuation</strong><br>
-      Quick mobilization for medical emergencies, trauma patients, neonatal transport,
-      and organ retrieval.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- COST -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Cost of Air Ambulance in Kuwait</h2>
-
-    <p>Air ambulance costs in Kuwait depend on several factors:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Type of Aircraft</li>
-      <li>Distance and Destination</li>
-      <li>Medical Equipment Required</li>
-      <li>Condition of the Patient</li>
-      <li>Size and Expertise of Medical Team</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden charges.

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>What is an air ambulance service in Kuwait?</strong><br>
-      An air ambulance service in Kuwait provides emergency and planned medical
-      transportation by specially equipped aircraft for critically ill or injured
-      patients, with advanced life-support systems and trained medical teams.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services across Kuwait?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides services throughout Kuwait and international
-      medical evacuations.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How much does an air ambulance cost in Kuwait?</strong><br>
-      Cost depends on distance, aircraft type, patient condition, and level of care.
-      Free medical assessment and transparent quotation are provided.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>What medical facilities are available onboard?</strong><br>
-      ICU setup, ventilators, oxygen systems, cardiac monitors, infusion pumps,
-      and emergency medications.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange international medical evacuation?</strong><br>
-      Yes. We manage medical coordination, flights, and documentation worldwide.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How quickly can an air ambulance be arranged?</strong><br>
-      Services can be arranged within hours, subject to medical clearance and approvals.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Is air ambulance suitable for ICU or ventilated patients?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Continuous monitoring and ICU-level care are provided throughout the journey.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Do you provide bed-to-bed transfer?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Ground ambulance, hospital coordination, air transfer, and safe handover
-      are included.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>What documents are required?</strong><br>
-      Medical reports, passport and visa copies, fit-to-fly certificate, and hospital
-      acceptance letter for international transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Is air ambulance safe for long-distance transfers?</strong><br>
-      Yes. It is one of the safest and fastest options for critical medical transport.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Can insurance cover air ambulance services?</strong><br>
-      Some insurance policies may cover services. Assistance is provided for coordination.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Why choose Air Medical 24X7?</strong><br>
-      24/7 emergency response, global expertise, ICU-equipped aircraft, trained teams,
-      transparent pricing, and compassionate care.
-    </p>

-    <h1 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Oman</h1>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved, ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24X7 from Oman to
-      195 global destinations. Fast, reliable, and affordable medical evacuation with expert care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 delivers emergency air medical transfer, critical care jets, and international
-      patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Muscat and all major regions of Oman.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and cost-effective air ambulance solutions for critical cases,
-      trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and long-distance medevac. Whether you need a
-      private ICU air ambulance or a commercial stretcher service, our experienced medical teams
-      provide uninterrupted care from takeoff to landing.
-    </p>
-
-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Why Choose Air Medical 24X7 in Oman</h2>
-    <ul>
-      <li><strong>24/7 Emergency Response</strong> - Immediate access to air ambulance services anywhere in Oman, including Muscat, Salalah, Sohar, and beyond.</li>
-      <li><strong>Global Coverage</strong> - Connect to over 100 countries including India, UK, Germany, USA, UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Southeast Asia.</li>
-      <li><strong>Specialist Medical Teams</strong> - Critical care doctors, ICU nurses, and paramedics on every flight.</li>
-      <li><strong>ICU-Configured Aircraft</strong> - Fleet of medically equipped jets and air ambulance planes.</li>
-      <li><strong>Rapid Medical Evacuation</strong> - Quick mobilization for trauma, neonatal transport, and organ retrieval.</li>
-    </ul>
-
-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Cost of Air Ambulance in Oman</h2>
-    <p>Air ambulance costs in Oman depend on several factors:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Type of Aircraft</li>
-      <li>Distance and Destination</li>
-      <li>Medical Equipment Required</li>
-      <li>Condition of the Patient</li>
-      <li>Size and Expertise of Medical Team</li>
-    </ul>
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden charges.
-    </p>
-
-
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Our Air Ambulance Services in Oman</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>1. Emergency Medical Flights</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Immediate ICU air evacuation for critical patients</li>
-      <li>Takeoff from Muscat International Airport or regional airstrips</li>
-      <li>Fully monitored care throughout the journey</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>2. Medical Repatriation Flights</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Safe return of patients to their home countries</li>
-      <li>Visa formalities, ground transport, and end-to-end coordination</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>3. Commercial Airline Stretcher Services</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Cost-effective option for stable patients</li>
-      <li>Includes medical escort and airline coordination</li>
-      <li>Available on select international flights from Oman</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>4. Private Air Ambulance Charter</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Dedicated ICU aircraft for bed-to-bed patient transfers</li>
-      <li>Ideal for long-distance and high-dependency cases</li>
-    </ul>
-
-

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">FAQ</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>Q. How Much Does an Air Ambulance Cost in Oman?</strong><br>
-      Air ambulance costs vary depending on aircraft type, distance, patient condition, and medical care required.
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers transparent pricing with free medical evaluation.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Q. How to Book a Flight for a Medical Emergency?</strong><br>
-      Call or WhatsApp +968 94 123 4567 anytime. Our team coordinates aircraft, medical staff, and ground transport immediately.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Q. How to Call an Ambulance in Oman?</strong><br>
-      Dial 999 for local emergencies. For air evacuation, contact Air Medical 24X7 directly.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Q> How Quickly Can an Air Ambulance Be Arranged?</strong><br>
-      We can mobilize an air ambulance within hours depending on logistics and patient location.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Q. What Is GCC Medical for Oman?</strong><br>
-      GCC Medical refers to healthcare standards within Gulf countries. Air Medical 24X7 aligns with GCC healthcare protocols.

-    <!-- PAGE TITLE -->
-    <h1 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Qatar</h1>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved, ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7
-      from Qatar to over 195 global destinations. Fast, reliable, and affordable
-      medical evacuation with expert care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 delivers emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets,
-      and international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Doha
-      and all major regions of Qatar.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and cost-effective air ambulance solutions
-      for critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and
-      long-distance medevac. Whether you need a private ICU air ambulance or a
-      commercial stretcher service, our experienced medical teams provide
-      uninterrupted care from takeoff to landing.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- WHY CHOOSE -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Why Choose Air Medical 24X7 in Qatar</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>24/7 Emergency Response</strong><br>
-      Immediate access to air ambulance services anywhere in Qatar, including Doha,
-      Al Rayyan, Al Wakrah, and beyond.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Global Coverage</strong><br>
-      Connect to over 100 countries including India, UAE, UK, Germany, USA,
-      Saudi Arabia, and Bahrain.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Specialist Medical Teams</strong><br>
-      Critical care doctors, ICU nurses, and paramedics on every flight.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>ICU-Configured Aircraft</strong><br>
-      Fleet of medically equipped jets and air ambulance planes.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Rapid Medical Evacuation</strong><br>
-      Quick mobilization for medical emergencies, trauma patients, neonatal
-      transport, and organ retrieval.
-    </p>

-    <ul>
-      <li>Safe return of patients to their home countries</li>
-      <li>Complete end-to-end coordination, visa formalities, and ground transport</li>
-    </ul>
-

-    <ul>
-      <li>Cost-effective option for stable patients</li>
-      <li>Includes medical escort, airline coordination, and documentation</li>
-      <li>Available on select international flights from Qatar</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>Private Air Ambulance Charter</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Dedicated ICU aircraft for bed-to-bed patient transfer</li>
-      <li>Ideal for long-distance transfers and high-dependency cases</li>
-    </ul>

-
-    <p><strong>What conditions require emergency care in Qatar?</strong><br>
-      Emergency care is required for heart attacks, strokes, severe injuries,
-      breathing difficulties, accidents, and unconsciousness. Air Medical 24X7
-      ensures rapid emergency response with advanced medical equipment in Qatar.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>What is the best ambulance service in Qatar?</strong><br>
-      Air Medical 24X7 is among the most trusted providers of ambulance services
-      in Qatar, offering ground and air ambulance solutions with ICU-equipped
-      vehicles and expert medical staff.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How fast is ambulance service in Qatar during emergencies?</strong><br>
-      Response times depend on location, but Air Medical 24X7 operates 24/7 to
-      ensure quick dispatch for both ground and air ambulance services.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Is ambulance service in Qatar available 24/7?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides round-the-clock ground ambulance and air
-      ambulance services across Qatar.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How much does an ambulance service cost in Qatar?</strong><br>
-      Ambulance costs depend on distance, type of service, and medical support
-      required. Air Medical 24X7 offers transparent pricing with no hidden charges.

-    <!-- PAGE TITLE -->
-    <h1 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in Saudi Arabia</h1>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved, ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7
-      from Saudi Arabia to over 195 global destinations. Fast, reliable, and
-      affordable medical evacuation with expert care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 delivers emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets,
-      and international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Riyadh,
-      Jeddah, Dammam, and all major regions of Saudi Arabia.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and cost-effective air ambulance solutions for
-      critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and long-distance
-      medevac. Whether you need a private ICU air ambulance or a commercial stretcher
-      service, our experienced medical teams provide uninterrupted care from takeoff
-      to landing.
-    </p>

-    </p>

-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">FAQ</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>1. What Injuries Require an Air Ambulance in Saudi Arabia?</strong><br>
-      An Air Ambulance in Saudi Arabia is essential for critical injuries such as
-      severe trauma, cardiac emergencies, strokes, or respiratory failure.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>2. When Should You Use an Air Ambulance Service in Saudi Arabia?</strong><br>
-      You should opt for an Air Ambulance Saudi Arabia for medical emergencies where
-      time is critical or for long-distance transfers.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>3. What Types of Ambulance Services Are Available in Saudi Arabia?</strong><br>
-      Ground Ambulance, ICU-equipped Air Ambulance Services, and Repatriation Medical
-      services are available across Saudi Arabia.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>4. How Can I Book an Ambulance Service in Saudi Arabia Quickly?</strong><br>
-      Call or WhatsApp our 24/7 emergency line for immediate dispatch of Air Medical
-      Services or ground ambulance support.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>5. What Is the Cost of an Air Ambulance or Ambulance Service in Saudi Arabia?</strong><br>
-      Costs depend on aircraft type, distance, medical equipment, and level of care.
-      Pricing is transparent and competitive.

-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved, ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7

-      medical evacuation with expert care onboard.

-      and international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Victoria

-      for critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and

-      uninterrupted care from takeoff to landing.

-    </ul>

-    <ul>
-      <li>Cost-effective option for stable patients</li>

-      <li>Available on select international flights from Seychelles</li>
-    </ul>
-

-    <ul>

-    </ul>

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>What is an air ambulance service in Seychelles?</strong><br>
-      An air ambulance service in Seychelles provides urgent medical transportation
-      by specially equipped aircraft for patients requiring advanced care that may
-      not be locally available.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Does Air Medical 24X7 provide air ambulance services in Seychelles?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Air Medical 24X7 provides air ambulance services throughout Seychelles,
-      including Mahé and other islands, along with international evacuation.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Why is air ambulance important in Seychelles?</strong><br>
-      As an island nation, air ambulance services are crucial for ICU transfers,
-      emergencies, and rapid evacuation to specialized hospitals abroad.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How much does an air ambulance cost in Seychelles?</strong><br>
-      Costs depend on destination, aircraft type, patient condition, and medical
-      team requirements. Free medical evaluation is provided.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Is air ambulance safe for long-distance transfers?</strong><br>
-      Yes. Air ambulance is one of the safest and fastest options for long-distance
-      medical transfers with continuous ICU-level care.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Why choose Air Medical 24X7?</strong><br>
-      Trusted 24/7 response, island evacuation expertise, ICU-equipped aircraft,
-      skilled medical professionals, transparent pricing, and compassionate care.

-    <!-- PAGE TITLE -->
-    <h1 class="display-4 mb-4">Air Ambulance Services in UAE</h1>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers FAA-approved, ICU-equipped air ambulance services 24/7
-      from the UAE to over 195 global destinations. Fast, reliable, and affordable
-      medical evacuation with expert care onboard.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 delivers emergency air medical transfers, critical care jets,
-      and international patient repatriation services available 24/7 across Dubai,
-      Abu Dhabi, and all major regions of the UAE.
-    </p>
-
-    <p>
-      We specialize in secure, rapid, and cost-effective air ambulance solutions for
-      critical cases, trauma emergencies, inter-hospital transfers, and long-distance
-      medevac. Whether you need a private ICU air ambulance or a commercial stretcher
-      service, our experienced medical teams provide uninterrupted care from takeoff
-      to landing.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- WHY CHOOSE -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Why Choose Air Medical 24X7 in UAE</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>24/7 Emergency Response</strong><br>
-      Immediate access to air ambulance services anywhere in the UAE, including Dubai,
-      Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and beyond.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Global Coverage</strong><br>
-      Connect to over 100 countries including India, UK, Germany, USA, Saudi Arabia,
-      Bahrain, and Southeast Asia.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Specialist Medical Teams</strong><br>
-      Critical care doctors, ICU nurses, and paramedics on every flight.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>ICU-Configured Aircraft</strong><br>
-      Fleet of medically equipped jets and air ambulance planes.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Rapid Medical Evacuation</strong><br>
-      Quick mobilization for medical emergencies, trauma patients, neonatal transport,
-      and organ retrieval.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- COST -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Cost of Air Ambulance in UAE</h2>
-
-    <p>Air ambulance costs in UAE depend on several factors:</p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Type of Aircraft</li>
-      <li>Distance and Destination</li>
-      <li>Medical Equipment Required</li>
-      <li>Condition of the Patient</li>
-      <li>Size and Expertise of Medical Team</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p>
-      Air Medical 24X7 offers transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden charges.
-    </p>
-
-    <!-- SERVICES -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">Our Air Ambulance Services in UAE</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>Emergency Medical Flights</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Immediate ICU air evacuation for critical patients</li>
-      <li>Takeoff from Dubai International Airport, Abu Dhabi International Airport, or regional airstrips</li>
-      <li>Fully monitored care throughout the journey</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>Medical Repatriation Flights</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Safe return of patients to their home countries</li>
-      <li>Complete end-to-end coordination, visa formalities, and ground transport</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>Commercial Airline Stretcher Services</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Cost-effective option for stable patients</li>
-      <li>Includes medical escort, airline coordination, and documentation</li>
-      <li>Available on select international flights from UAE</li>
-    </ul>
-
-    <p><strong>Private Air Ambulance Charter</strong></p>
-    <ul>
-      <li>Dedicated ICU aircraft for bed-to-bed patient transfer</li>
-      <li>Ideal for long-distance transfers and high-dependency cases</li>
-    </ul>
-

-    <!-- FAQ -->
-    <h2 class="text-primary mt-5 mb-3">FAQ</h2>
-
-    <p><strong>What is an Air Ambulance Service in UAE?</strong><br>
-      An Air Ambulance Service in UAE provides rapid medical evacuation for patients
-      in critical condition using ICU-equipped aircraft and specialist medical teams.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Does Air Medical 24X7 provide Air Ambulance Service in Dubai and across the UAE?</strong><br>
-      Yes, Air Medical 24X7 offers comprehensive Air Ambulance Service in Dubai and
-      across the UAE with 24/7 coverage.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>Can Air Medical 24X7 arrange Medical Repatriation and International Air Ambulance from the UAE?</strong><br>
-      Yes, we specialize in Medical Repatriation and International Air Ambulance
-      services from the UAE to over 195 countries.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How fast can an Air Ambulance in the UAE be arranged?</strong><br>
-      Air ambulances can be mobilized within hours depending on urgency and logistics.
-    </p>
-
-    <p><strong>How much does an International Air Ambulance Cost?</strong><br>
-      Costs depend on aircraft type, distance, medical equipment, and patient condition.
-      We provide transparent pricing with no hidden charges.
-    </p>

+    // Resolve relative home/logo links to the absolute repository root URL dynamically
+    $(document).ready(function() {
+        var pathname = window.location.pathname;
+        var basePath = '';
+        if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('.github.io') !== -1) {
+            var segments = pathname.split('/');
+            if (segments.length > 1 && segments[1]) {
+                basePath = '/' + segments[1];
+            }
+        }
+        var rootUrl = window.location.origin + basePath + '/';
+        
+        $('a').each(function() {
+            var href = $(this).attr('href');
+            if (href === './' || href === '../') {
+                $(this).attr('href', rootUrl);
+            }
+        });
+    });
